tasks.subject: Rewrite autodebug.md — all new features, phases, arguments
tasks.description: Add new arguments, new phases (API contract, Docker), dedup rules, ignore list, notifications, incremental indexing, parallel mode, updated phase numbers and focus map.

tasks.description: Add Phase 10-13 to required_sections, add tests for repo_audit.py new commands (ignore, unignore, snapshot, diff, dedup, min-severity).

tasks.subject: Update CHEETAHCLAWS.md and README.md
tasks.description: Update project context and docs to reflect all bug fixes and new features.

tasks.subject: Add Phase 0: BUSINESS LOGIC DISCOVERY to autodebug.md
tasks.description: Add a new Phase 0 that runs before all other phases. It discovers business logic by analyzing code structure, naming, data models, and flows. It then presents a Business Logic Summary + Questions to the user for confirmation. Only after confirmation does the scan proceed. Phase 6 (LOGIC BUGS) now uses confirmed business logic to find real logic bugs instead of just mechanical patterns.

tasks.subject: Add phase 0_business_logic to repo_audit.py
tasks.description: Add '0_business_logic' phase to repo_audit.py init_audit phases dict. Renumber all phases or keep 0 as pre-phase.

tasks.subject: Update test_skill.py for Phase 0
tasks.description: Update test_skill.py: add Phase 0 to required sections, update phase count from 13 to 14

tasks.subject: Add BUSINESS LOGIC DISCOVERY section + update Phase 6 + mission rules
tasks.description: Add '## BUSINESS LOGIC DISCOVERY' section to autodebug.md explaining the full workflow. Also update Phase 6 to reference confirmed business logic. Update SETUP step ordering. Update MISSION to allow pause for business logic confirmation. Update focus mode phase map to include Phase 0.
